//Introduction Screen
onEvent("nextButtonIntroduction", "click", function( ) {
	setScreen("bestWeapons");
	playSound("sound://category_achievements/lighthearted_bonus_objective_1.mp3");
	console.log("Screen 2/4");
});


//Best Weapons Screen
onEvent("nextButtonBestWeapons", "click", function( ) {
  setScreen("worstWeapons");
  playSound("sound://category_achievements/lighthearted_bonus_objective_1.mp3");
  console.log("Screen 3/4");
});
onEvent("backButtonBestWeapons", "click", function( ) {
  setScreen("introduction");
  playSound("sound://category_alerts/comedy_game_over_1.mp3");
  console.log("Screen 1/4");
});


//Worst Weapons Screen 
onEvent("nextButtonWorstWeapons", "click", function( ) {
  setScreen("gamemodes");
  playSound("sound://category_achievements/lighthearted_bonus_objective_3.mp3");
  console.log("Screen 4/4");
});
onEvent("backButtonWorstWeapons", "click", function( ) {
  setScreen("bestWeapons");
  playSound("sound://category_achievements/lighthearted_bonus_objective_2.mp3");
  console.log("Screen 2/4");
});


//Gamemodes Screen
hideElement("whyYouShouldPlay");
onEvent("backButtonGamemodes", "click", function( ) {
  setScreen("worstWeapons");
  playSound("sound://category_alerts/comedy_game_over_1.mp3");
  hideElement("whyYouShouldPlay");
  hideElement("rickRollButton");
  showElement("gamemodeDescription");
  showElement("bonusButton");
  stopSound("NBA-Quandale---Right-Foot-Creep--Official-Audio-(griddy-song)(Clean).mp3");
  stopSound("Rick-Astley---Never-Gonna-Give-You-Up-(Official-Music-Video).mp3");
  console.log("Screen 3/4");
});
onEvent("bonusButton", "click", function( ) {
  showElement("rickRollButton");
  hideElement("gamemodeDescription");
  showElement("whyYouShouldPlay");
});
onEvent("rickRollButton", "click", function( ) {
  hideElement("whyYouShouldPlay");
  showElement("rickAstley");
  playSound("NBA-Quandale---Right-Foot-Creep--Official-Audio-(griddy-song)(Clean).mp3");
  playSound("Rick-Astley---Never-Gonna-Give-You-Up-(Official-Music-Video).mp3");
});
